intentAndPurpose.intent: Animated AI-agent presence indicator. Plays a looping animation per state (idle / listening / thinking / speaking) and auto-runs a bridge animation between states. Recolours to the active appearance role. Honours reduce-motion via a configurable fallback. Announces state changes through a live region.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state; plays the matching loop and bridges between states.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role; recolours the animation at runtime (auto → primary).

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset (sm / md / lg / xl, mapped to dimension f-steps) or a pixel number.

props.name: autoTransition
props.description: Skip the bridge animation between states when false.

props.name: reducedMotionFallback
props.description: Behaviour when the user prefers reduced motion.

props.name: label
props.description: Overrides the auto-derived a11y label (e.g. "Agent is thinking").

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. Colour is driven by appearance, not inline paint. — [warn] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance`; the animation recolours from the role tokens.
